text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the day's training is done, I decide to go
over our upcoming schedule. As I take out my
notebook...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It slips out of my hands... and drops smack into a
puddle.
choice_data_list: Sigh... Looks like I need a new notebook...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, I can make a cover for it if you like?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It won't be able to fix the damage, but it
should help protect your notebook a bit longer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the thought, but I don't want it to
take up Nishino Flower's free time.
choice_data_list: I couldn't ask you to go through the trouble.

text_block_list.text: Aw shucks, what a waste!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're turning down the chance to get your hands
on a handmade cover from Flower? They're the
best around.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The cover she made for my tackle box has been
tough enough to withstand every kind of adverse
element I've subjected it to.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, and it works like a dream. I'd like to ask her
to make me another one, honestly.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't sure how well it would turn out since I
made it from a pattern template, but I'm glad you
like it so much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've still got plenty of fabric left over, so I'd be
glad to make you another tackle box cover!

Mmm? In that case, I would like to put in a
request as well! Could you make me something I
can use while conducting research?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The arm covers you crafted for me are peerless in
terms of quality!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
They've shielded my arm against countless
mishaps, from explosions to chemical spills!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! What's more, the covers' texture is
outstanding, making them extremely comfortable
to wear!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm deeply intrigued by their strength and
composition. Such qualities could be put to
practical use in my research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So I ask, in the name of scientific progress! Please
construct another pair of arm covers for me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No... Let's embark on a joint research project
instead! You may use my laboratory as you see
fit. How does that grab you?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you. I'm glad to see you're so
passionate about my arm covers.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I'm happy just making them my usual way. We
don't need to do anything extreme in a lab!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
No kiddin'! Flower's covers are all the rip-roarin'
rage!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Taiki! R-rip... roaring?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The grip cover ya made for my revolver's
perfect for practicin' my gun spinnin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
No matter how roughed up it gets or how many
times I drop it, it never so much as frays!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
They don't make 'em that good in the States, I
tell ya!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
In other words, what she's offering is the real
deal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we know it, we're surrounded by
passionate devotees of Nishino Flower's
handmade covers. They shower her work with
effusive praise.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea everyone was so pleased with
them... I only made those covers for fun. If
anything, I thought I was just being a bother...

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: A bother? No way!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, I, uh... Thank you! I'm so happy that you like
my work!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ohh... My cheeks are burning up!
choice_data_list: Now I can't wait to see my new notebook cover.
Now I can't wait to see my new notebook cover.
No need to hide your feelings!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ohh... My cheeks are burning up!
choice_data_list: Now I can't wait to see my new notebook cover.
Now I can't wait to see my new notebook cover.
No need to hide your feelings!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-oh, right! One notebook cover coming right up!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll put all my heart into it, so I hope it puts a
smile on your face! And I'll make covers for
everyone else, of course!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yet another fan joins the ranks... Well, what can
you do?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
What?! You want me to express myself more than
this?! I'm not even sure how...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
BOOM! Just puff out yer chest, Flower! Yer
number one in everyone's hearts, don'tcha know!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay! Time to show you all my gratitude...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, everyone! I really appreciate the nice
things you said!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her devoted following quietly nods in unison at
the sentiment.
